params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the Brain component class - 'commands' (optional).

commands.title: Command List
commands.description: List of commands to execute. Each entry is a [goto_on_exception, cmd_name, cmd_params] tuple. Brain is disabled if empty.
commands.markdownDescription: List of commands to execute. Each entry is a `[goto_on_exception, cmd_name, cmd_params]` tuple. Brain is disabled if empty.

prefixItems.title: Goto on Exception
prefixItems.description: Brain index to jump to if this command returns an exception. null means advance to next command.

prefixItems.title: Command Name
prefixItems.description: Name of the command to execute.
